---
title: "OECD Semiconductor Watch"
subtitle: "What global research means for India's chip ambitions"
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
  - id: latest-reports
    contents: posts
    type: default
    sort: "date desc"
    max-items: 3
    fields: [date, title, description, oecd-url, categories]
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
  - id: india-critical
    contents: posts
    type: table
    sort: "india-relevance desc"
    max-items: 10
    fields: [date, title, india-relevance, oecd-url, categories]
    field-display-names:
      india-relevance: "India ★"
      oecd-url: "OECD source"
    include:
      india-relevance: "{4,5}"
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
---

::: {.hero-block}
# OECD Semiconductor Watch

<span class="hero-accent"></span>

::: {.hero-tagline}
The OECD produces some of the most careful research on global semiconductor policy — from subsidy benchmarking to country reviews of Mexico, the Dominican Republic, and beyond. This site curates that research and asks, for each report: **what does it mean for India?**
:::
:::

## India Dashboard {.unnumbered}

::: {.dashboard-grid}

::: {.dashboard-card}
::: {.card-label}
India's semiconductor commitment
:::
::: {.card-value}
~$10bn
:::
::: {.card-context}
vs. US CHIPS Act $52.7bn · EU Chips Act ~$46bn
:::
:::

::: {.dashboard-card}
::: {.card-label}
India's commercial fab capacity
:::
::: {.card-value}
0 kwpm
:::
::: {.card-context}
First fabs under construction at Dholera and Sanand
:::
:::

::: {.dashboard-card}
::: {.card-label}
India semiconductor workforce
:::
::: {.card-value}
~95k
:::
::: {.card-context}
Dominated by design / R&D; middle-skill gap is the binding constraint
:::
:::

:::

> Dashboard figures are drawn from publicly-reported national commitments. See [Compare Countries](comparisons.qmd) for the full cross-country view.

## Latest curated reports {.unnumbered}

:::{#latest-reports}
:::

[See all reports →](reports.qmd)

## India-critical reports {.unnumbered}

Reports with an India-relevance rating of 4 or 5 — directly relevant to Indian semiconductor policy debates.

:::{#india-critical}
:::

::: {.editor-note}
**Editor's note.** OECD Semiconductor Watch is curated by [Pranay Kotasthane](https://pranaykotas.com) at the [Takshashila Institution](https://takshashila.org.in). The aim is to make OECD semiconductor research accessible and actionable for India's policy community. If you come across a relevant OECD publication that should be covered here, please [open an issue](https://github.com/pranaykotas/oecdwatch/issues/new) or email pranay@takshashila.org.in.
:::

```{=html}
<script>
// Enhance OECD-url columns and india-relevance columns on the homepage listings.
(function () {
  function enhance() {
    document.querySelectorAll('.listing-oecd-url').forEach(function (el) {
      var url = (el.textContent || '').trim();
      if (!url || el.dataset.enhanced === '1') return;
      el.dataset.enhanced = '1';
      el.innerHTML = '<a href="' + url + '" class="oecd-source-inline" target="_blank" rel="noopener">OECD ↗</a>';
    });
    document.querySelectorAll('.listing-india-relevance').forEach(function (el) {
      var n = parseInt((el.textContent || '').trim(), 10);
      if (!n || el.dataset.enhanced === '1') return;
      el.dataset.enhanced = '1';
      el.innerHTML = '<span class="india-relevance" title="India relevance: ' + n + '/5">' + '★'.repeat(n) + '</span>';
    });
  }
  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', enhance);
  } else {
    enhance();
  }
  setTimeout(enhance, 250);
  setTimeout(enhance, 1000);
})();
</script>
```
